emails.subject: Bullets, Please
emails.body: It is Friday again. Bullets, Please by mid morning..... Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: Bullets, please
emails.body: RE: Bullets, please No bullets just an FYI for you. El Paso Field Services called this week to inquire whether TW?Enron would consider selling off any of its assets. I spoke with Gina Tylor about who to refer this question to and she said Eric's group. Kevin and I called EPFS back and they are interested specifically in buying the Atoka and Crawford laterals. While such a sale of assests would have a big impact on TW, it's alittle too early to tell if EPFS is serious. I'll keep you posted. To: Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK; McConnell, Mark; Y'barbo, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Bullets, please
emails.body: thanks for the heads up. Please mention in Steve's staff meeting on Monday. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Bullets, please
emails.body: RE: Bullets, please No bullets although I am making progress resolving the Duke imbalances and moving forward with NGPL in getting an acceptable OBA document put together. To: Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK; Lokay, Michelle; McConnell, Mark; Y'barbo, Paul
